ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the class the team belongs to */,
  "team_foundation_date" TEXT /* Date when the team was formed */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach assigned to the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class (e.g., 3M, 5M) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "max_team_size" INTEGER /* Maximum number of members allowed in the class */,
  "min_team_size" INTEGER /* Minimum number of members required for the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the member belongs to */,
  "member_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the team member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the team member (e.g., captain, athlete) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the member joined the team */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the team member */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the team member */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role within the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event (e.g., biking, canoeing, hiking) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "distance" TEXT /* Distance covered in the event */,
  "event_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "event_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performances" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "total_time" TEXT /* Total time taken by the team to complete the competition */,
  "place" INTEGER /* Ranking of the team in the competition */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time taken by the team in the specific event */,
  "performance_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance */,
  "event_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the specific event */,
  "event_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the specific event */,
  "is_complete" INTEGER /* Indicates if the team completed the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competition_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "place" INTEGER /* Ranking of the team in the competition */,
  "total_time" TEXT /* Total time taken by the team to complete the competition */,
  "competition_date" TEXT /* Date of the competition */,
  "competition_name" TEXT /* Name of the competition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competition_results_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_access" TEXT /* Last date the user accessed the platform */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team whose data is being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the notification is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the notification is for */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., performance update, event reminder) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the report is for */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., performance, ranking) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_url" TEXT /* URL to the generated report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
